Luxury Chauffeur & Limousine Service in Riyadh

Premium limousine and chauffeur-driven transportation for airport transfers, event transportation, and VIP services across Saudi Arabia.

Our Services Scroll down to Services

 

Our SERVICES

Our full range of transportation solutions

City to city ride

The ultimate alternative to trains or short-haul flights—travel between cities in total privacy and comfort.

Learn more about City to city ride
Corporate & Events

Premium chauffeur solutions for corporate delegations, VIPs, business meetings ensuring punctual and professional travel for every event.

Learn more about Corporate & Events
Hourly Rental

Enjoy total freedom with a dedicated chauffeur at your disposal for hourly or full-day bookings, tailored to your schedule.

Learn more about Hourly Rental
Chauffeur Service

Elevate your travel experience with our Premium Chauffeur Service, where luxury meets...

Learn more about Chauffeur Service
Airport Transfer

Stress-free pickups and drop-offs with real-time flight tracking and "Meet & Greet" service as standard.

Learn more about Airport Transfer

Ready to Experience LUXURY CHAUFFEUR SERVICE IN RIYADH?

Experience luxury, reliability, and comfort with Amhar. Book your chauffeur service now and enjoy a premium travel experience tailored to your needs.

Book Now

WHY CHOOSE US

Reliable, safe, and comfortable transportation tailored to your needs.

WHAT OUR CLIENTS SAY

We take pride in the trust and satisfaction of our clients. Here’s what they have to say about our services.

5.0
(82)
Ali abdallah
8 days ago
Thank you for the excellent hospitality and outstanding service provided by the team. Special thanks to Mr. Murtada and Mr. Basit for their support and warm reception from the airport until the end of the trip
Read more
Rabbi Hasan
11 days ago
I had a great experience with this company. The driver was extremely professional, respectful, and made the entire journey comfortable and enjoyable. I truly appreciate the excellent service and would highly recommend others to use their services. special thanks to Basit.
Read more
Emma Lou
24 days ago
I have used our wonderful trusted limo serviceI’ve many times since I have been in Saudi! So respectful and graceful highly recommended without a doubt
Read more
Tahani BB
1 month ago
We used Amhar chauffeur service for a full-day, multi-day company booking, and the experience was excellent from start to finish. The drivers were professional, punctual, and courteous, making transportation seamless for our team throughout the entire service period. Communication was smooth, the vehicles were clean and comfortable, and everything was handled efficiently. Highly recommend for corporate transportation and professional events.
Read more
Abdulaziz Alzouman
1 month ago
Absolutely outstanding chauffeur service. The company is professional, fast, and provides a truly high-end experience from start to finish. Their response time is excellent and everything is handled smoothly and efficiently. Special thanks to MIR — he is honestly a big reason why the experience stands out. His professionalism, quick communication, and ability to handle everything perfectly make the whole service feel premium and stress-free. Highly recommended.
Read more
Mathi Venkat
3 months ago
This from Ihi corporation we are booked in Riyadh trip and service is very very good and driver basit khan is very nice guy we happy to say the best
Read more
Engr Abbas Khan
3 months ago
I appreciate the service provided by Amhar Chauffeur. It was prompt, clean, and respectful. Thank you to the Amhar Service team.
Read more
Mike Accardo
4 months ago
Mujahid was my driver this week, my first time in Ryhad for business. He was fantastic! He went out of his way to make my mult-day travel as smooth as possible. I will be requesting Majahid (specifically) by name the next time I am in Ryhad. 5+ STARS. I am thankful for his professionalism and training. I look forward to utilizing his services in the future.
Read more
